aboutPage.title: About Sayapatri Dental Hospital
aboutPage.description: Established in 2009, Sayapatri Dental Hospital has been at the forefront of dental care in Nepal. We combine traditional values with modern technology to provide exceptional dental services.
aboutPage.missionDesc: To provide comprehensive, high-quality dental care in a comfortable and caring environment. We are committed to helping our patients achieve and maintain optimal oral health through prevention, education, and treatment excellence.
aboutPage.visionDesc: To be the leading dental care provider in Nepal, recognized for our commitment to patient satisfaction, clinical excellence, and innovative treatment approaches. We envision a community where everyone has access to quality dental care.
aboutPage.valuesDesc: These core values guide everything we do at Sayapatri Dental Hospital

values.title: Patient-Centered Care
values.description: We put our patients first, ensuring comfort and satisfaction in every treatment.

values.title: Excellence in Treatment
values.description: Committed to providing the highest quality dental care with proven results.

values.title: Expert Team
values.description: Our team of specialists brings years of experience and continuous learning.

values.title: Timely Service
values.description: Respecting your time with efficient scheduling and prompt care delivery.

aboutPage.journeyDesc: Milestones in our commitment to dental excellence
journeyEvents: Sayapatri Dental Hospital was founded with a vision to provide quality dental care
Expanded services to include advanced orthodontic treatments
Introduced digital imaging and CAD/CAM technology
Continuing to serve the community with excellence and innovation
aboutPage.teamDesc: Our team of experienced dental professionals is dedicated to providing you with the best care

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.description: Get in touch with our team. We're here to help with all your dental care needs and answer any questions you may have.

hours.title: Hours
hours.description: We're here when you need us

contactPage.messageDesc: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contactPage.subject: Subject
contactPage.messagePlaceholder: Tell us more about your inquiry...
contactPage.visitDesc: Located in the heart of Kathmandu, our modern clinic is easily accessible.
contactPage.directionsDesc: Our clinic is located on New Road, easily accessible by public transport. Parking is available nearby.
contactPage.publicTransportDesc: Take any bus to New Road bus stop. We're just a 2-minute walk from there.
contactPage.emergencyDesc: For dental emergencies outside business hours, call our emergency hotline. We provide 24/7 emergency dental care.
contactPage.faqDesc: Quick answers to common questions about our services

faqs.question: Do you accept insurance?
faqs.answer: Yes, we accept most major dental insurance plans. Contact us to verify your coverage.

faqs.question: Do you offer payment plans?
faqs.answer: We offer flexible payment options including installment plans for major treatments.

faqs.question: How far in advance should I book?
faqs.answer: We recommend booking routine appointments 2-3 weeks in advance. Emergency appointments available same day.

faqs.question: Do you treat children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have a dedicated pediatric dentistry department for children of all ages.

contactPage.successDesc: Thank you for contacting us. We'll get back to you soon.
contactPage.errorDesc: Failed to send message. Please try again later.

appointmentPage.title: Book Your Appointment
appointmentPage.description: Schedule your dental appointment today. Our team is ready to provide you with exceptional care in a comfortable environment.
appointmentPage.scheduleDesc: Please fill out the form below to request an appointment. We'll contact you to confirm the details.
appointmentPage.specialRequestsPlaceholder: Please mention any allergies, medical conditions, or special requests...
appointmentPage.emergencyDesc: If you're experiencing a dental emergency, please call us immediately.
appointmentPage.bookedDesc: We'll contact you soon to confirm your appointment details.
